{{Infobox location
| name = Naraka waystation
| introduced = tg-03-city-of-light
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Naraka]] waystation is a fixed location situated within the northern walls of the city of [[Naraka]]. It serves as a vital transit point, connected to other locations such as [[Enosh]] via specific trails and waypoints. These stations utilize gates that can be held open by [[Naraka]] [[Travelers]], though the passage through them may involve unpleasant scents like sulfur and woodsmoke. The waystation is capable of being sealed by a Grandmaster in a manner that even multiple [[Travelers]] cannot reverse. While the station features architectural elements like tiled floors and staircases that can emit an azure glow, it has also been subject to destruction, leaving behind ruins located in the [[Blue District]].}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Naraka]] waystation is a building that [[Simon]] runs toward. This location can be targeted by [[Gold]] [[Light]] blasts, which [[Alin]] uses to blast the corners of the structure into rubble. Following this destruction, [[Alin]] walks up to the [[Naraka]] waystation.}}

{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon]] runs to the [[Naraka waystation]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c10">''City of Light'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Naraka waystation]] is a building.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c11">''City of Light'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Naraka waystation]] is a location that can be targeted with [[Gold]] [[Light]] blasts.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c12">''City of Light'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Alin]] can blast the corners of the [[Naraka waystation]] to rubble.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c13">''City of Light'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Alin]] walks up to the [[Naraka waystation]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c15">''City of Light'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate locations]]
